runTitle: Local QA - AI Engine Pino v10 Alignment

environment.backend: Cloud Run AI Engine local source

expertAssessments.rationale: The change is dependency alignment on the AI Engine logger surface and was verified with runtime import, targeted logger tests, type-check, and production audit.
The validation avoided broad coverage chasing and used the smallest high-signal checks for the changed logger dependency surface.

completedImprovements.title: Align AI Engine pino to v10
completedImprovements.evidence: AI Engine pino updated from installed 9.14.0 to 10.3.1; targeted logger tests, type-check, runtime import, and production npm audit passed.

notes: Root app already used pino@10.3.1; AI Engine manifest previously allowed pino ^9.6.0 and installed 9.14.0.
AI Engine package manifest and lockfile now resolve pino@10.3.1.
pino v10 pulls thread-stream@4.1.0 with Node >=20; repo and AI Engine engines are >=24 <25 and the Cloud Run Dockerfile uses Node 24.
node -e import smoke passed: pino function export, version 10.3.1.
npx vitest run src/lib/logger.test.ts --silent=passed-only passed: 1 file / 2 tests.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run type-check passed.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm audit --omit=dev passed with 0 vulnerabilities.
No full AI Engine test suite, live AI, Vercel, Cloud Run production, or external provider call was executed because the changed risk surface is limited to the logger dependency.
